title: erigeron breviscapus
intro: Erigeron breviscapus, also known as Erhiao or Danggui Longhui Xie, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is a member of the daisy family and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Erigeron breviscapus is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
